title: Why Lebanon’s Government Has Struggled to Contain Hezbollah
summary_full: Lebanon’s government has been caught between Western demands to disarm the Shiite Muslim militant group and fears of inflaming sectarian tensions.
summary_public: Lebanon’s government has been caught between Western demands to disarm the Shiite Muslim militant group and fears of inflaming sectarian tensions.

LB.label: negative
